programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in California, where they find some outdated designs and others that are in-style once again.

programs.title: Vanderpump Rules
programs.desc: Lisa gives Marcus an opportunity to DJ a premiere party at SUR. Shayne dates two girls at the same time. Audrey tells Angelica about Chris and Jason's other job, which leads to explosive consequences.

programs.title: Chopped
programs.desc: The competitors take on ingredients that would usually be thrown away in hopes of turning edible trash into culinary treasures.

programs.title: Beach Hunters
programs.desc: A couple looks for a relaxing retreat along the beaches of Galveston, TX, where they can unwind. S5 E14.

programs.title: Island Life
programs.desc: A couple is tired of staying with family while visiting Kill Devil Hills. They want a move-in ready home with a yard for their dogs. S18 E6.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: A woman struggles to persuade her Australian boyfriend to give up his shed dreams for a family home. S173 E1.
